segments.text: I have just moved to a house in Bridge Street.

translations.zh-Hans: 我刚搬进了大桥街的一所房子。

segments.text: Yesterday a beggar knocked at my door.

translations.zh-Hans: 昨天一个乞丐来敲我的门。

segments.text: He asked me for a meal and a glass of beer.

translations.zh-Hans: 他向我要一顿饭和一杯啤酒。

segments.text: In return for this, the beggar stood on his head and sang songs.

translations.zh-Hans: 作为回报，那乞丐倒立起来，还唱了几支歌。

segments.text: He ate the food and drank the beer.
Then he put a piece of cheese in his pocket and went away.

translations.zh-Hans: 然后把一块奶酪装进口袋，走了。

segments.text: Later a neighbor told me about him.

translations.zh-Hans: 后来，一位邻居告诉了我他的情况。

segments.text: He calls at every house in the street once a month and always asks for a meal and a glass of beer.

translations.zh-Hans: 他每月在这条街上每户人家登门一次，总是要一顿饭和一杯啤酒。
